problem: Why do lithium batteries degrade at high temperature — ionic mechanism unclear
mechanism: Plasma confinement via magnetic mirror geometry
hypothesis: Plasma confinement via magnetic mirror geometry may resolve Why do lithium batteries degrade at high temperature — ionic mechanism unclear by activating at the systems level.
